inputs.label: Initial Nail Length
inputs.businessContext: Current length of the nail from nail bed to tip in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current length of the nail from nail bed to tip in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tırnağın tırnak yatağından uca kadar mevcut uzunluğu (milimetre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Länge des Nagels vom Nagelbett bis zur Spitze in Millimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur actuelle de l'ongle du lit de l'ongle à l'extrémité en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud actual de la uña desde el lecho ungueal hasta la punta en milímetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول الحالي للظفر من قاعدة الظفر إلى الطرف بالمليمترات.

inputs.label: Target Nail Length
inputs.businessContext: Desired final nail length in millimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired final nail length in millimeters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur finale souhaitée de l'ongle en millimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud final deseada de la uña en milímetros.

inputs.label: Growth Rate per Month
inputs.businessContext: Average nail growth rate in millimeters per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average nail growth rate in millimeters per month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık milimetre cinsinden ortalama tırnak büyüme hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Nagelwachstumsrate in Millimetern pro Monat.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de croissance moyen de l'ongle en millimètres par mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa promedio de crecimiento de la uña en milímetros por mes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط معدل نمو الظفر بالمليمترات شهريًا.

inputs.label: Breakage Rate per Month
inputs.businessContext: Average nail breakage/loss per month without protection.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average nail breakage/loss per month without protection.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Koruma olmadan aylık ortalama tırnak kırılması/kaybı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Nagelbruch/-verlust pro Monat ohne Schutz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Casse/perte moyenne d'ongle par mois sans protection.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rotura/pérdida promedio de la uña por mes sin protección.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط كسر/فقدان الظفر شهريًا بدون حماية.

inputs.label: Protection Factor
inputs.businessContext: How well you protect your nails (0 = no protection, 1 = full protection).

businessContext_i18n.en: How well you protect your nails (0 = no protection, 1 = full protection).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tırnaklarınızı ne kadar iyi koruduğunuz (0 = koruma yok, 1 = tam koruma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie gut Sie Ihre Nägel schützen (0 = kein Schutz, 1 = vollständiger Schutz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dans quelle mesure vous protégez vos ongles (0 = aucune protection, 1 = protection totale).
businessContext_i18n.es: Qué tan bien protege sus uñas (0 = sin protección, 1 = protección total).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مدى حماية أظافرك (0 = لا حماية، 1 = حماية كاملة).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
